meaning: n.砰然而有效的一击,妙计,出乎意料的行动,政变
examples: Mr. Ben Bella was deposed in a coup in 1965.
Stock markets plunged at the news of the coup.
U.S. officials are discounting rumours of a coup.
With iPhone, Steve Jobs and Apple pulled off their biggest and most comprehensive market systems coup.
The 2009 coup has left Madagascar isolated by the international community and deprived of foreign aid.
